zh.Newton Flotman, Norfolk, England, United: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可牛頓 福洛特曼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alyse Carre Doggett於1502年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可牛頓 福洛特曼時，她的父親Richard Doggett21歲，母親Sarah Ann LeGris17歲。她於1518年與Richard Raven在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1563年7月在英國米德萊可倫敦享年61歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 奧古斯丁 煙雨 聖 菲絲 沃特林 史崔特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alyse Carre Doggett于1502年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可牛頓 福洛特曼时，她的父亲Richard Doggett21岁，母亲Sarah Ann LeGris17岁。她于1518年与Richard Raven在英国艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1563年7月在英国米德萊可倫敦享年61岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 奧古斯丁 煙雨 聖 菲絲 沃特林 史崔特。

nameMeanings.name: Doggett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Duckett with voicing of the medial consonant. Alternatively, the name may also be from a Middle English rhyming pet form of Roger (see Dodge ) + the diminutive suffix -et. But whether the medial -g- was pronounced as a stop /g/ (as in dog) or an affricate /dʒ/ (as in Roger) is impossible to tell.

variants.name: Duckett
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Duket. This may sometimes have been an early Middle English pet form of an Old English Ducc(a), but was more often a pet form of Marmaduke, especially in Yorkshire (see Duke ). Marmaduke itself is from Irish Maol Maedóc ‘servant of Maedóc’, Maedóc being the name of prominent Irish saints of the 6th and 7th centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Alyse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Carre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of Caroline or occasionally of other girls' names beginning with the syllable Car-, now often bestowed as a name in its own right.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Alyse Carre Doggett was born in 1502, in Newton Flotman, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Doggett, was 21 and her mother, Sarah Ann LeGris, was 17. She married Richard Raven in 1518, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in July 1563, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in London St Augustine with St Faith Watling Street, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alyse Carre Doggett est née en 1502, à Newton Flotman, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Doggett, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sarah Ann LeGris, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Raven en 1518, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en juillet 1563, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Augustine with St Faith Watling Street, Middlesex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Alyse Carre Doggettが1502年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクニュートン フロトマンで生まれた時，父Richard Doggettは21歳，母Sarah Ann LeGrisは17歳であった。1518年にイギリスエセックスデドハムでRichard Ravenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1563年7月にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで61歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト アウグスティン ウィス スト ファイス ワトリング ストレエトにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Augustine Watling Street, London,: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 오구스틴 위스 스트 파이스 왓링 스트릿
ko.lifeSummary: Alyse Carre Doggett(이)가 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 뉴턴 플로트먼에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Doggett(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Ann LeGris(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1518년 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Richard Raven(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1563년 7월 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 오구스틴 위스 스트 파이스 왓링 스트릿에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Raven em 1518, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.Saint Augustine Watling Street, London,: лондон ст аугустаин вит ст феит ватлинг стрит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alyse Carre Doggett родилась в 1502 г. в местности нютон флотман, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Doggett было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Ann LeGris, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Raven в 1518 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла июль 1563 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности лондон ст аугустаин вит ст феит ватлинг стрит, миддлесекс, Англия.
